changes.title: Updated onboarding wizard steps
commit_messages: feat: add preferences and done steps to onboarding
changes.explanation: Added two new steps (Preferences and Done) to the onboarding wizard. The step indicator now shows 4 dots instead of 2, and the wizard flow includes a preferences form before the completion screen.

changes.title: Onboarding form validation
commit_messages: feat: add client-side validation to onboarding form
changes.explanation: Added client-side form validation using a new useFormValidation hook. Required fields now show inline error messages before allowing the user to proceed to the next step.
changes.risk_notes: Validation runs on blur and submit. Users on slow devices may see a brief delay.

changes.title: Onboarding preferences API endpoint
commit_messages: feat: add POST /preferences endpoint for onboarding
changes.explanation: New API endpoint to save user preferences during onboarding. Uses upsert to handle both first-time and returning users.
changes.risk_notes: No rate limiting on this endpoint yet. Should be added before launch.
